compression.zstd/ZstdFile/peek.name: peek
compression.zstd/ZstdFile/peek.description: Return buffered data without advancing the file position. At least one byte of data will be returned, unless EOF has been reached. The exact number of bytes returned is unspecified (the size argument is ignored). Note While calling peek() does not change the file position of the ZstdFile, it may change the position of the underlying file object (for example, if the ZstdFile was constructed by passing a file object for file).
